–1. Called AZARIAH
  .King of Judah2Ki 14:21;15:1,2;2Ch 26:1,3
  .Rebuilds Elath2Ki 14:22;2Ch 26:2
  .Reigns righteously2Ki 15:3;2Ch 26:4,5
  .Defeats the Philistines2Ch 26:6,7
  .Takes tribute from the Ammonites
  .Strengthens the kingdom2Ch 26:8
  .Strengthens the fortifications of Jerusalem2Ch 26:9
  .Promotes cattle raising and agriculture2Ch 26:10
  .Military establishment of2Ch 26:11-15
  .Is presumptuous in burning incense; stricken with leprosy; quarantined2Ch 26:16-21;2Ki 15:5
  .Jotham regent during quarantine of2Ki 15:5;2Ch 26:21
  .Death of2Ki 15:7;2Ch 26:23
  .History of, written by Isaiah,2Ch 26:22;Isa 1:1
  .An earthquake occurred during the reign ofAm 1:1;Zec 14:5
–2. Son of Uriel1Ch 6:24
–3. Father of Jehonathan1Ch 27:25
–4. A priest
  .Puts away (divorced) his Gentile wifeEzr 10:21
–5. Father of AthaiahNe 11:4
